subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Him Who hath manifested His Name, the letter Bá, upon the ocean of Há, when light appeared and was reflected upon the face of the waters [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی تجلی باسمه الباء علی بحر الهاء اذا ظهر نو و تقبب علی وجه الماء
subcodes.subjects: @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @The Primal Will; self-generation of the Primal Will, @suffering and imprisonment, @growth of the Cause
